title: Regional model hosting for Genie Spaces in Japan and Korea
body:
For workspaces in `ap-northeast-1` (Tokyo) and `ap-northeast-2` (Seoul), [Genie Spaces](/aws/en/genie) now use models hosted in the same region. Users in these regions no longer require [cross-Geo processing](/aws/en/resources/databricks-geos#cross-geo-processing) to use Genie Spaces.

See [Availability of Designated Services in each Geo](/aws/en/resources/designated-services#ds-availability) for more information on which features require cross-geo processing.

ref_links.text: Availability of Designated Services in each Geo
